positive: A mesmerizing, highly stylized celestial fox spirit sitting amidst stylized constellations and nebula formations. The fox should have a clean, graceful silhouette with flowing, ethereal fur tails patterned like aurora borealis. The overall style must be a blend of Art Nouveau and cosmic psychedelia, using strong contrast between deep indigo/midnight blue and vibrant, luminous neon gold/electric cyan. The composition must feature the fox centrally, isolated against the cosmic background, designed for maximum readability and impact when printed on fabric. Elements include swirling stardust, stylized geometric constellations (like zodiac signs, but abstract), and glowing lunar motifs. Studio quality digital illustration, vector-clean lines, high contrast, symmetrical balance.
negative: blurry, grainy, noisy, amateur, watermark, text, logo, signature, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, low detail, artifacts, extra limbs, human face, photorealistic
